Looking at the options given: June is in the middle of the April to October range, so that's definitely within the usual period. October is at the end of the range but still included. September is also in that span. The only month outside of this range is February, which is during the winter. Since the trips are mostly between April and October, February would be a time when fewer people are rafting there.
